name: Payment API HTTP 500 After Deployment
incident: Payment API returns HTTP 500 errors immediately after deployment. Database timeout alerts are observed.

name: VPN Connection Failure
incident: Remote users cannot establish VPN connections. Gateway timeout errors are reported.

name: Database Unreachable
incident: Production database is unreachable. Monitoring reports repeated timeout failures.

name: Kubernetes Resource Exhaustion
incident: CPU utilization exceeds 98% across Kubernetes worker nodes after deployment.

name: Identity Provider Failure
incident: Users cannot authenticate after an identity provider maintenance window.
